# mosaic { #forensicface.mosaic }

`mosaic`

Mosaic-building utilities for original images and aligned faces.

## Functions

| Name | Description |
| --- | --- |
| [build_mosaic_from_aligned_faces](#forensicface.mosaic.build_mosaic_from_aligned_faces) | Build a rectangular BGR mosaic from already aligned RGB face images. |
| [build_mosaic_from_images](#forensicface.mosaic.build_mosaic_from_images) | Detect, align, and build a rectangular BGR mosaic from original images. |

### build_mosaic_from_aligned_faces { #forensicface.mosaic.build_mosaic_from_aligned_faces }

```python
mosaic.build_mosaic_from_aligned_faces(
    aligned_faces,
    mosaic_shape,
    border=0.03,
    save_to=None,
    draw_keypoints=False,
    keypoints=None,
    image_size=DEFAULT_FACE_SIZE,
)
```

Build a rectangular BGR mosaic from already aligned RGB face images.

### build_mosaic_from_images { #forensicface.mosaic.build_mosaic_from_images }

```python
mosaic.build_mosaic_from_images(
    processor,
    img_path_list,
    mosaic_shape,
    border=0.03,
    save_to=None,
    draw_keypoints=False,
)
```

Detect, align, and build a rectangular BGR mosaic from original images.
